title: 10 best herbal teas for nasal congestion
description: Ceylon cinnamon teas helps with nasal congestion because of its natural expectorant properties, which loosen and clear out excess mucus from the nasal passages. The warm and soothing effects of the tea also help to reduce inflammation and ease sinus pressure, making it easier to breathe through the nose.
